subject: docs(todo): document critical import ID removal requirement
body:
IDs are meaningless in import/merge — imported data cannot know
existing DB IDs or its own. All real use cases involve connecting
data from different sources where only content (title, labels,
properties) can be used for matching. Documents 6 concrete use
cases and outlines the required content-based identity system.

Tags: import, merge, architecture, identity
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: api
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: remove-import-ids
Semver: patch

title: document critical import ID removal requirement
